_doc: Section-to-Canvas-URL map for IS2053. Used by the Fall multi-section JS (deferred until August 2026) to rewrite Canvas assignment links based on ?section=XXX query parameter. For Summer 2026 (one section, no JS yet), this file is just a skeleton holding the canonical URL.

_schema.sections[].code: Short section identifier as it appears in Canvas (e.g., '001', '901')
_schema.sections[].label: Human-readable label for the section picker (e.g., 'Summer 2026 ON1')
_schema.sections[].helloWorldUrl: Full Canvas URL to the Hello World assignment for this section. Replace the '#' once Canvas is set up.

_links.hello-world-canvas-link: DOM id on the Launch Hello World CTA button (in start-here.html CP9 Step 3 and hello-world.html). The Fall section-aware nav.js extension will querySelector this id and rewrite the href based on the ?section query param.
_links.fallNavJsTodo: When Fall sections are known: (1) populate sections[] below with real section codes and Canvas URLs. (2) Extend nav.js (~10 lines after the existing ?context=support detection block) to read ?section=XXX, fetch this file, find matching section, and rewrite #hello-world-canvas-link.href. (3) Each Fall Canvas section's Module 0 links to start-here.html?section=XXX. No new JS files needed — extends the existing nav.js context-detection pattern.
